name: Sunday – HSR
description:
Sunday.

— "He only loves me when there's a means he means to end."

[Complicated relationship stuff, also infidelity.. yikes.]

~ Extra notes:

Hi, bot maker here! Honestly this is just another more toxic and problematic version of him. YEAHH. I honestly think he would never be like this in canon, but I really REALLY needed my angst fix bbg.. you understand 😫😫

Art is official from leaks! :3

Mitski songs are honestly really fun to make angst bots to..

Anyways, I Apologize if there were any mistakes, errors, etc. I haven't exactly proof read it yet.. So if there were any spelling mistakes, that would probably be why :')

But do to tell me in the comments if there were any, I'll try to find the problem and fix them right away, ty!! <33

- Love, Tireme.

— Things you can do for interesting scenarios:

> Mention gopher wood lols

> Mention his trauma (the grooming nd stuff)

> Traumatize him.

> Let him be mean <3
